chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 76 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case 1. For orders on MA No.3318/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on withdrawal statement dated 21-06-2021 21-06-2021 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant states that he wants to withdraw the present Criminal Miscellaneous Application, hence, the same is dismissed as withdrawn. J U D G E Abdul Basit
